programme.desc: S1:E21 Episodes 41-42 - Victor mystery | Mutant squirrel

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: S1:E22 Episodes 43-44 - Young Simon says | Pixel & Teresa date

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Monkey Up
programme.desc: The all-new family comedy about a talking capuchin monkey seeking to gain fame and fortune as a movie star, but instead finds what's most important, a family.

programme.title: Birds Like Us
programme.desc: The story follows a group of birds on a journey where they try to find a better life for themselves and the ones they love.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers.

programme.title: Waiting...
programme.desc: Young employees at Shenaniganz restaurant collectively stave off boredom and adulthood with their antics.

programme.title: Earthfall
programme.desc: As our planet is pulled out of orbit, worldwide disaster unfolds. A man reuniting with his family discovers a secret government mission that could save the world. Starring Joe Lando. (2015)

programme.title: Stormageddon
programme.desc: When a computer program, Echelon, takes over America's computer systems it gains the potential to manipulate the weather. Now two robots, Adam and Cain, fight to gain control of Echelon before its too

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A government experiment inadvertently creates a time warp and suddenly a dangerous World War Two battleship appears. Stars Malcolm McDowell (2012).

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: A team of marines attempt to survive after a training mission against warfare A.I. goes wrong. Starring Thure Lindhardt and Vanessa Kirby (2016)

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Based on the popular line of Mattel toys and the hit TV series, "Max Steel" is a teenage superhero for the next generation, combining action, comedy, and cutting edge special effects into an epic adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Lena and Snowball
programme.desc: Bullied at school and lonely at home, Lena keeps hoping she'll have a true friend someday. One afternoon, her dreams come true - in the shape of a cuddly white lion cub. Lena tries to keep playful Snowball out of trouble, but the clumsy poachers who kidnapped the valuable cub, and the cruel trophy collector who paid for him, are desperate to get him back. As Lena races to rescue poor Snowball, her new friend Jake will do anything to help. Be careful, or Snowball will melt your family's heart.

programme.title: Spirit Riders
programme.desc: When a rebellious teen is arrested and sentenced to an equine therapy camp, she forms a connection with a spirited thoroughbred that she helps train with the guidance of the ranch's no-nonsense owner.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Murder by Decree
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates the murders commited by Jack the Ripper and discovers a conspiracy to protect the killer.

programme.title: Listen To Your Heart
programme.desc: A singer/songwriter falls in love with a girl who can't hear the music she inspires him to write.

programme.title: Killing your Daughter
programme.desc: When a DNA test helps Candace connect with her birth parents, she realizes some family histories are better left untold.

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: Dragons, warriors, orcs, bounty hunters, goblins, wizards, elves, witches, maidens in distress, beautiful princesses, romance, true love, betrayal and magic come together when an unlikely group of heroes embark on a quest to save the land from an evil wizard who has sent a fire-breathing dragon to kill everyone in his realm who has fallen in love.

programme.title: Deathstalker 2
programme.desc: In this parody of the sword and sorcery films, a princess is deposed by an evil sorcerer. She enlists the aid of Deathstalker to battle the forces of evil, including a clone of the princess, and win back her kingdom.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of conscientious objector Desmond Doss who saved 75 men in WWII without firing a gun.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: 48 hours to D-Day, Winston Churchill struggles with his severe reservations with Operation Overlord.

programme.title: 12 in a Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget, where they are given the chance to win a life-changing 1million each. The only catch is, they cannot leave the estate for 96 hours, and anyone who enters the grounds must also stay for the duration! With time ticking away, the mismatched dozen are forced to work together to keep the peace and work toward their payday. But, when they have to deal with an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and then even a visit from the boys in blue, will this hapless clan be able to hold it together or will their dreams of riches be buried with the bodies? Staring Miranda Hart (Miranda, Call the Midwife) and Katy Wix (Not Going Out), this is classic British farce at its best.

programme.title: It's A Wonderful Afterlife
programme.desc: Finding the perfect son-in-law can be murder. Mrs Sethi can't bear the thought of her daughter being alone and unhappy... she would make a great wife for some lucky man, if only she were given a chance. So when she can no longer stomach the rudeness of families who refuse her daughter, Mrs Sethi takes matters into her own hands with the only way she knows... Suddenly a police hunt begins for a serial murderer who cooks a killer curry.

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson
programme.desc: Comedy drama as Robert Carlyle plays Barney Thomson, a downtrodden barber who has fallen from grace in his meagre barbering life. One day whilst almost losing his job, Barney comically falls into the unthinkable role of a serial killer. As he sweats out his predicament, and attempts to clumsily cover his tracks, a police detective investigating a series of murders in the area begins to suspect Barney may not be all he appears to be. All the while Barneys mother Cemolina cheerfully emasculates her son, setting off a bloody chain of events.

programme.title: We Still Kill The Old Way (2014)
programme.desc: When retired East End villain Charlie Archer is murdered by a feral street gang, his brother Ritchie returns to London from Spain to investigate. With the police investigation drawing blank after blank, Ritchie decides to take the law into his own hands and bring his old school justice back to the streets of East London. Rounding up his old firm, he leads a vigilante crusade against the vicious young criminals, using every grizzly method at his disposal to find and punish his brother's killers. They're outgunned and outnumbered, but this firm has never been outclassed yet!

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: The Quake delivers non-stop action and edge-of-your-seat thrills at an epic scale! A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake of 5.3 magnitude strikes Oslo, Norway. Your nails will dig into the arms of your chair in this incredible disaster movie with jaw-dropping special effects.

programme.title: Plan A
programme.desc: A gripping, high voltage and action-filled thriller based on an incredible true story. In 1945 a group of young Holocaust survivors pledged to avenge the death of their people. Headed by charismatic Abba Kovner (August Diehl: Inglourious Basterds), they devised the biggest plan for Jewish revenge in history: to kill millions of Germans by poisoning their drinking water.

programme.title: The Furnace
programme.desc: Set in the 1890s gold rush of Western Australia and starring David Wenham (300), Jay Ryan (IT: Chapter 2), Mahesh Jadu (The Witcher) and Baykali Ganambarr (The Nightingale). To escape a harsh existence, a young Afghan cameleer partners with a mysterious bushman on the run with two 400oz Crown-marked gold bars. Together they must outwit a zealous police sergeant in a race to reach a secret furnace.

programme.title: Dangerous Mind of a Hooligan
programme.desc: The creative collaboration of Paul Tanter and Simon Phillips (White Collar Hooligan) brings you this action packed Football hooligan turned bank robber tale. An exciting chase movie with twists and turns as the police close in on a team of hooligans who have turned their violence onto the scoundrel bankers!

programme.title: Luckless In Love
programme.desc: Blogger Winnie and sports agent Holden are both dating with the intention to further their career. As their feelings grow, they discover the only people they are lying to are themselves. (2022)

programme.title: A Little Daytime Drama
programme.desc: Maggie is the head writer of a daytime show, which hasn't been doing well since ex-boyfriend and Star of the show Darin left the show. Will she be able to convince Darin to return to the show?

programme.title: A Perfect Match
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Emily Alatalo. A woman tests her company's new dating app and matches with her complete opposite. Will it be a dating disaster or can opposites really attract?

programme.title: Planning For Joy
programme.desc: Small business owner Hazel hires charismatic Theo to help boost her public speaking. Can Theo's unconventional approach make Hazel become nature in front of the cameras or will she be lost for words?

programme.title: Love Strikes Twice
programme.desc: A woman is hit by a car while on her way to drop off divorce papers. When she wakes up without any memory, her husband is determined to recapture her heart. Stars Katrina Begin, Tilky Jones (2017)

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong a lasting marriage.

programme.title: Radio Rebel
programme.desc: Tara Adams is just an ordinary high school junior, except for one little thing. Tara has a secret identity-she's Radio Rebel, the most popular radio DJ in Seattle.

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Love Exclusively
programme.desc: When an ambitious reporter is recruited by to play cupid to famous pop musicians Caleb Greene and Carson Peet in return for an exclusive story over Valentine's weekend, she soon realizes Caleb has his sights set on her.

programme.title: It's a Fixer Upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers find they're in financial jeopardy, the only answer is to sell the house Anne's parent's left her. But when no one wants to buy it, they decide the only way to get rid of the house is to fix it up.

programme.title: Prescription For Love
programme.desc: Claire, a nurse, fights for a chance at love with a charming new doctor and for a promotion to free herself from the misery her supervisor creates. As her supervisor tries to derail Claire's chance at happiness, Claire will have to stand up for herself and go after her dreams.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Timeless Love
programme.desc: Megan seems to have the perfect life with a wonderful husband named Thomas and 2 adorable children. Then she finds herself awakening from a coma – and discovers she is not and has never been married. But when she meets Thomas for real, she seizes the chance to help him fall in love with her, again—for the first time.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets by The Lake
programme.desc: Original idea by LMN & Harlequin uncovers Thornwood Heights' murder secrets.

programme.title: Boy in the Attic
programme.desc: Teen girl and mom inherit house, unknowingly housing a hidden boy in the attic.

programme.title: Husbands Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Barbra found Prince Charming in Michael, until accusations arose over his new job.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A writer returns to her hometown for inspiration and reinkindles her romance with her first love.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Young divorce lawyer Kelsey finds it safer to keep love out of her life - that is until a stray dog pairs her with Harrison, the local vet.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki and Henry hunt the sewers for a Windigo, an ancient native spirit.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki and Mike must overcome their animosity and search the city for Henry while he's being tortured.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: Money Train
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes and Woody Harrelson are together again in MONEY TRAIN, an action-adventure story of two New York City decoy cops and the heist of a subway train carrying millions of dollars. MONEY TRAIN co-stars Jennifer Lopez as a sexy new decoy cop who heats things up when both men fall for her.

programme.title: Beyond The Law
programme.desc: A trio of thieves plot to steal a town's silver shipment but a turn of events makes them the town's heroes.

programme.title: The Man from Utah
programme.desc: In a horse-riding rodeo contest bad guys want John Weston to lose. When he doesn't go along they add some insurance: a poisoned needle just under his saddle.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A local sheriff is unjustly accused of murder in a small town and forced to flee.

programme.title: Pistol for a Hundred Coffins
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran swears revenge when he returns home to find his family killed by a local gang.

programme.title: Colorado Sundown
programme.desc: Rancher helps a friend claim a spread he's inherited, only to get involved in his murder.

programme.title: THE DIVORCE OF LADY X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine
programme.desc: The story revolves around one weekend in the Crompton household.

programme.title: No Place for Jennifer
programme.desc: Distraught after her parents' divorce, nine-year-old Jennifer becomes increasingly neurotic and is sent to a center for maladjusted children.

programme.title: Painted Boats
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of two families living on the colourfully painted canal boats of Britain.

programme.title: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: From acclaimed director Basil Dearden, creator of such classic, celebrated British films such as The Blue Lamp and The League of Gentlemen, comes a bedazzling ensemble piece that encapsulates the early days of recreational aviation. Starring Bernard Lee (who later found fame as James Bond's ‘M'), James Robertson Justice (Doctor in the House) and Carry On star Sid James, Out of the Clouds perfectly encapsulates the glamour and excitement of post-war air travel. Out of the Clouds follows the complex lives of several passengers and members of an airline crew during a typical bustling day at Heathrow Airport. A pilot dealing with his gambling addiction, a chief duty officer who dreams of becoming a pilot, a love struck American engineer and an extremely popular air hostess are just some of the unforgettable characters.

programme.title: Absolute Denial
programme.desc: In an escalating battle of two minds, a reclusive programmer is plunged into a terrifying, mind-bending revelation as he becomes exposed to the social engineering of his own sentient AI. Award-winning hand drawn animation.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah (Isabelle Allen), is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Skyman
programme.desc: The story of Carl who believes he experienced an alien encounter at 10-years-old and is now trying to reconnect with the UFO as the same location.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: Infini
programme.desc: Humanity has become the victim of mass overpopulation and the line between middle class and poverty no longer exists. Whit Carmichael has accepted a high-risk security job that requires off-world travel using Slipstream.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: The 5Th Wave
programme.desc: Four waves of increasingly deadly alien attacks have left most of Earth decimated. Against a backdrop of fear and distrust, Cassie (Chloë Grace Moretz) is on the run, desperately trying to save her younger brother. As she prepares for the inevitable and lethal 5th wave, Cassie teams up with a young man who may become her final hope – if she can only trust him.

programme.title: The 5Th Wave
programme.desc: Four waves of increasingly deadly alien attacks have left most of Earth decimated. Against a backdrop of fear and distrust, Cassie (Chloë Grace Moretz) is on the run, desperately trying to save her younger brother. As she prepares for the inevitable and lethal 5th wave, Cassie teams up with a young man who may become her final hope – if she can only trust him.

programme.title: Lake Placid 3
programme.desc: In this sequel to Lake Placid 2 (the most watched Syfy Saturday Original Movie ever), a game warden, his wife and their young son move into their aunt's cabin on Lake Placid, where the lonely boy starts feeding baby crocodiles he views as pets. Three years later, the crocs start looking at him and his family as their food.

programme.title: Skin
programme.desc: A black child born to white parents is cast out of white society in 1950s South Africa. The film follows her thirty-year journey to acceptance.

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A man presumed dead shows up after six years, but he may be an imposter, and could choose to hang for murder rather than reveal the truth.

programme.title: Pressure Point
programme.desc: Friday Night Lights meets The Social Network. Starring Oscar nominee Michael Shannon and featuring Alexander Ludwig (Vikings) and Charles Melton (Riverdale) is inspirational sports drama, Pressure Point...

programme.title: I Am Woman
programme.desc: The story of Helen Reddy, who in 1966 landed in NYC with her three-year-old daughter, a suitcase and $230 in her pocket. Within five years she was one of the biggest superstars of her time, and an icon of the 1970s feminist movement.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.title: Exit Speed
programme.desc: Strangers use improvised weapons, adrenaline and sheer guts to mount a defense against murderous bikers and their survival depends on doing the unthinkable - fighting for their lives!

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme and Raul Julia star in this explosive action-adventure based on one of the most successful interactive games of all time. Street Fighter begins in a world on the brink of chaos, as a civil war in the southeast Asian nation of Shadaloo threatens to erupt into global conflict.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Jessica Alba heat up the screen as two divers who dream of finding hidden treasure. When they take some friends (Scott Caan, Ashley Scott) on an extreme sport adventure, the last thing they expect to see below the water is a legendary pirate ship rumored to contain millions in gold.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The USA is big on flash and spectacle. Bighorn rams rattle the mountaintops, brown bears battle, desperate to fatten up for winter, sharp-tailed grouse shake their tail-feathers on the dance floor, and wild stallions rumble with beauty and grace.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: From the Highlands to the Alps, Europe's evocative landscapes are the backdrop for epic wildlife drama. Normally stoic red deer go wild during the rut, wolf packs clash over territory, and foxes do the foxtrot, but it's not as nice as it sounds.

programme.title: Age of Big Cats: Survivors
programme.desc: Changes the planet has undergone affects big cats, from the almost complete disappearance of American wildlife to the rise of man, and threatens their survival.

programme.title: Impossible Animals: Rainforests
programme.desc: Patrick Ayree examines the rainforest residents who have pushed their bodies to the limit, revealing some of the most remarkable behaviours and adaptations in the animal world.

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Counts down some of the most incredible, spectacular and hilarious real life crashes in the world. Video cameras capture massive pile ups, road rage and misguided overtaking manoeuvres.

programme.title: Made for Murder: Willy Inmon
programme.desc: At the age of 21, Willy Inmon turned up at an Arizona police station and eventually confessed to three murders that he claimed to have committed out of a desire to clean up his hometown.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: When Carrie and her posse head to Staten Island to watch and judge the New York City Fire Department's `Calendar Contest', Carrie reluctantly meets a handsome politician while Samantha fulfils her fireman fantasy. Elsewhere, Charlotte believes she's found her knight in shining armour, and Miranda realises that being rescued isn't always a sign of weakness.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy tries to get everything organized at Heartland before joining Ty on a work-related journey, but Tim's concerns about the trip threaten to derail Amy's plans. Meanwhile, Ty runs into trouble on the job, but sending a message back home proves more difficult than anticipated. With a big competition coming up, Georgie struggles to master a difficult new jump with Mitch's help, and Jack tries to balance everyone's needs.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty finds himself in a dangerous situation and in order to save him Amy must turn to an unexpected source for guidance. Meanwhile, Tim receives unsolicited advice about his past. Georgie tries to focus on her upcoming competition, but pressure from Val rattles her confidence. Also, Peter and Mitch must take care of a cranky Lyndy while Amy and Ty are away.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim is forced to open up when an emergency traps him with an unexpected visitor. Amy is hired to work with a former racehorse in need of a new owner. Meanwhile, Georgie has trouble deciding who to trust when Wyatt warns her of a possible betrayal. And Jack steps out of his comfort zone to support Lisa, but trouble arises when her ex-husband Dan makes an appearance.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Struggling with personal issues, Tim rallies the family to go on another memorial ride for Marion so he can face his deepest regret. Meanwhile, Georgie is forced to make a very difficult decision when Val questions Amy's ability to be her show jumping coach. Tim pushes Jade to accept a huge scholarship opportunity down in Texas, while Jack pushes Tim to finally be honest with Amy and Lou about his health issue.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As the family struggles to deal with Tim's news, Lou throws herself into planning her high school reunion to impress an old rival. Meanwhile, Amy tries to stay focused as Georgie comes up against an unexpected challenge while beginning to train with Phoenix. And Jack fights to control his own emotions as Mitch pressures him to discuss the future of the cattle business with Tim.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A threat from Ty's past arrives in Hudson, putting the entire Heartland family in danger. Meanwhile, in the wake of an unexpected romantic encounter, Lou struggles with insecurities about her failed relationships, and Georgie worries about Adam's reaction when she tells him about her new status with Wyatt. And a worried Jack sticks close to Amy as they prepare for winter at the ranch.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As Thanksgiving approaches, Georgie puts her personal feelings about Peyton Westfield aside and convinces Amy to work with a high strung and dangerous jumping horse. Meanwhile, Jade returns from Texas for the holiday weekend and Tim is forced to admit why he was so adamant she accept the rodeo scholarship. Wyatt goes completely overboard trying to prove his affection for Georgie and it lands them in a comical but compromising situation. And when Lou can't make it home for Thanksgiving, Jack and Lisa try to save tradition by coercing a secret family recipe out of her.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A training accident results in a serious injury and Georgie feels conflicted when an unlikely ally arrives at Heartland to show support. Meanwhile, Jack begins to consider his legacy and what he wants to leave to his family, but is interrupted when he and Mitch work to save a winter calf at risk of starvation. Jack is also caught in the middle when Lisa's projects begin to take over the ranch house and she decides to make Amy's room into an office.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When some old friends return to Hudson on vacation, Amy tries to teach them about the life-changing power of connecting to a horse, in order to help them cope with parenting struggles. Meanwhile, Georgie gets invited on a road trip, but it might not be everything she hoped for. And with Lou back in New York, Peter takes care of Katie, but worries when she doesn't come home from a trail ride. Then, Jack and Lisa receive an unexpected housewarming gift.

programme.title: Ancient Lost Worlds

programme.title: Europe in the Middle Ages
programme.desc: Europe in the Middle Ages - Knights and Tournaments: Picturesque castles, noble knights, minnesingers and troubadours - these romantic images fire our imagination in the generally accepted conception of the Middle Ages. On the darker side of this world, there are gloomy castle dungeons, torture chambers and bloody raids and power struggles.

programme.title: Europe in the Middle Ages
programme.desc: Europe in the Middle Ages - Monks and Heretics: As centres of missionary activity and science, monasteries made an important contribution to progress. Here, not only theology was taught and studied, but medicine, mathematics, astronomy, law and philosophy as well. With the translation of the ancient scripts into Latin, this knowledge was introduced to the western world.

programme.title: Dolphins and Whales
programme.desc: Ute Margreff lives on the rough Atlantic coast of Ireland, while Florian Graner has settled in the fjord region in the north-west of the USA. Both originally from Germany, they have never met, but they are united by one thing: a passion for the sea and its inhabitants.

programme.title: Molas and Manatees
programme.desc: The ocean occupies more than two-thirds of our planet's surface, constituting an extreme habitat with dimensions beyond our comprehension and a variety of lifeforms that can scarcely be chronicled. It is in the seven seas that we find the last "white spaces" of our world: unexplored, mysterious expanses still virtually off-limits to human beings – although that doesn't stop us recklessly plundering and destroying these areas.

programme.title: 300 Million Years
programme.desc: 300 Million Years - Season 1 - The Big Crash: 300 Million Years – Part One relates the dramatic history of how the continent of Europe came to be – from the carboniferous period to the extinction of the dinosaurs 65 million years ago. How did the continent we call Europe come to be? Many years passed before it began to look like it does today.

programme.title: 300 Million Years
programme.desc: 300 Million Years - Season 1 - Human Earth: In the subsequent 65 million years, mammals dominate the history of the European continent. Sea mammals conquered the oceans while large herds of herbivores crisscrossed the forests and plains. The conditions of life changed suddenly 2.6 million years ago, and a new era began.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - Achievements and Rewards: Europe's history has many dark sides, but its culture is more than a small gleam of hope, it radiates in many areas far out into the world. The old continent sets standards in art, literature and science. Starting with the ancient Greeks, Europe produces a number of smart and creative minds: from Aristotle to Michelangelo and Einstein, from Beethoven to the Beatles.

programme.title: Castle Stories: Burg Satzvey and the Counts Beissel von Gymnich
programme.desc: The moated castle Satzvey in Mechernich in the Voreifel: Here, the Beissel von Gymnich family has been staging knights' games, children's theatre and medieval Christmas markets for over 30 years. Every year, thousands of visitors find the illusion of a childhood dream of knights in shining armour and damsels in flowing dresses realised at Satzvey Castle.

programme.title: The Private Lives of the Habsburg Rulers
programme.desc: This new Heritage Austria production gives three women a chance to have their say, providing an unrivalled insight into the life of the Habsburgs: the closest servant of Empress Maria Theresa, Carolina Countess Fuchs-Mollard, the friend of Emperor Franz Joseph Katharina Schratt and the daughter of Crown Prince Rudolf, Archduchess Elisabeth, who found her way to becoming a women's rights campaigner and went down in history as the "red Erzsi". Three actresses, Petra Morzé, Stephanie Schmiderer and Gigga Neunteufel, slip into the three historical roles and present the ladies at key moments in their lives: on the day Joseph II was born, after the assassination of Empress Elisabeth and on the day the First Republic was founded. All three biographies offer keyhole perspectives into the very personal lives of the ruling family.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Grey Seal is Europe's largest water prediator. With its habitat in the fish rich costal areas in cool but not arctic waters we discover that recreation in the sun plays a major role for the seal, but we also see it raiding in dangerous waters.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: As soon as she arrives, conservationist Hannah Emde immerses herself in Namibia's wildlife. The first destination of her trip is the world-famous Naankuse Foundation near Windhoek

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah runs a health check on two female cheetahs with veterinarian Maaike. She then goes into the wilderness with Naankuse founder Marlice. Together they go in search of the elephant Apollo, which was resettled in the sanctuary. The former "problem" elephant now leads a peaceful life here.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In epsiode one we take a look at Kaua'i - the oldest island in the archipelago. Kaua'i's isolation for thousands of years led to an increased rate of evolution. In a relatively short time, new species are formed here, many animals and plants can only be found here. But they are in danger.

programme.title: African Nostalgia
programme.desc: Wildlife photographer Valter Torri has always been fascinated by the unique atmosphere of Africa. In this film, colours are bright, the sounds of nature ring out - you can almost smell the dusty heat. Every frame is dramatic - the fiery sky, the flowing river and the elegant wildlife. But for Valter, this beauty is always tinged with longing - how to reconcile the modern world in which he lives with the timeless majesty of nature.

programme.title: Enchanted Forest
programme.desc: There are few places on the planet more magical than the forest. To spend a day here is nature's way of offering a spa, a bathe in nature. There is enchantment at every turn.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Sardinia is the second-largest island in the Mediterranean. The Sardin-ians themselves say it's a "continent for itself", a virtual world of its own, full of magic: A beach, gleaming in unreal pink shades, red corals protect against the evil eye and the inhabitants seem to remain forever young. On Sardinia, the owners of luxury yachts adopt sheep, fish have gold in their bellies and a giant mussel supplies the material for legendary sea silk. No one is surprised, that the Madonna goes on a sea cruise once a year.

programme.title: Dream Islands Of Europe: Capri, Ischia and Procida
programme.desc: Capri and Ischia are world famous. From Naples, it's just a short hop over to the two islands. Perfect destinations, then, for a week's cruise along the Gulf of Naples and the adjoining Amalfi Coast to the south. There, Positano, Amalfi or Salerno as well as a handful of other mostly small harbor towns are extremely worthwhile destinations.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Sulcis Archipelago is located off the south-western coast of Sardinia and is part of the province of of southern Sardinia. The islands of San Pietro, Sant'Antioco and Isola Piana form the archipelago, together with several uninhabited islets and rocks form the archipelago. It belongs to the less known areas in Italy and is little developed for tourism. Nevertheless stars like Tom Cruise and Roberto Cavalli come here to enjoy the peace, seclusion and good food. The islanders are only moderately interested in these visitors, and their down-to-earth attitude has never lost. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Lake Iseo is located on the southern foothills of the Alps. It extends over the provinces of Brescia and Bergamo in the northern mainland of Italy. In the middle of Lake Iseo lies the largest island of the southern European inland waters. Monte Isola, as the island is called after its central mountain lies close to its two neighboring islands, Isola di San Paolo and Isola di Loreto. As early as the 11th century, a monastic association of Benedictines settled here. For many Italians, Lake Iseo is the most beautiful spot in their homeland. It is all the more astonishing how little the influence of tourism is here. Driving is strictly forbidden on the three islands, and only on Monte Isola. Only on Monte Isola there is a regular bus service in the summertime. Thus, the three islands are an oasis of an oasis of tranquility most of the year. The historical buildings and the nature remind of the long tradition in which the Italians have cultivated this retreat. Only every five years in the autumn a big celebration takes place. Then over 200,000 paper flowers decorate the island. The flowers are reminiscent of the time in the Middle Ages when a Roma woman brought her son to the island to be cured from the from the rampant plague. In gratitude, she donated a sea of flowers. The Festa di Santa Croce has been one of the main attractions in northern Italy ever since. The days are radiant with color, it is the only time when it gets crowded in the small streets of the island villages. The next festival was celebrated in September 2021. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Tuscan Archipelago is a group of islands at the height of Florence. The archipelago stretches from the Ligurian Sea to the Tyrrhenian Sea, north-east of Corsica. The archipelago consists of seven main islands - Giglio, Elba, Gianutri, Capraia, Pianisoa, Gorgona and Montecristo - and other smaller islands and rocks. Not all of them are inhabited. We look at the three most extraordinary islands of the archipelago: Elba, Capraia and the island of Montecristo. The Tuscan Archipelago is one of the most important natural wonders of the world and is protected as Parco Nazionale dell'Arcipelago Toscano. With its 61.474 hectares of protected and 17,694 hectares of protected land area, it is the largest marine protected area in in Europe. Capraia is the third largest island of the archipelago and is located with its small harbor in the channel in front of Corsica. The island is an autonomous municipality with about 300 inhabitants. It is also considered the most maritime island of the archipelago. At the end of the eighties, the penal colony on Capraia was closed was closed and the island opened to tourism. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Far from the glamour and spotlight of Lampedusa, Pantelleria is one of the best kept secrets among the Italian islands. Located closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria has been nicknamed "The Last Island," a title also given by Giosuè Calaciura gave to his 2016 historical novel set on Pantelleria. Pantelleria, that is the island of lava, capers and of the liqueur wine that comes here Zibibbo. An island with an ancient history, where for centuries farmers and fishermen have pursued their craft. their craft. The famous Zibibbo grapes are cultivated here - among other things also on the vineyard that Gerard Depardieu and his wife Carole Bouquet bought to produce traditional liqueur and nutmeg wine themselves and distribute it worldwide. The cuisine of the island is as much Arabic as Italian, couscous with fish is a typical island dish. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you're surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it's creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they're accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there's excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love. (S1 E11)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love. (S1 E16)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It's a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country's. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there's a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America's oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's getting an authentic taste from all around the globe, including Latin fusion in California, real-deal Thai in Phoenix, and Sicilian specialties in New Jersey.

programme.title: America's Musical Journey
programme.desc: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh embark on a fun-filled voyage through The Upper Peninsula of Michigan to experience the Sea Songs of the Great Lakes. Adventure is abound as they trek through lush forests, stunning waterfalls and even explore a historic shipwreck. Along the way, they meet folk legends Dan Truckey and Lee Murdock, who introduce them to the captivating world of sailors' tunes. From Lake Ballads to Sea Shanties, their journey culminates at the treasured Hiawatha Folk Festival, where campfire songs and communal vibes celebrate the region's enduring charm.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh visit Lafayette, Louisiana where they take a deep dive into Zydeco music and local crawfish with Grammy-winning musician Chubby.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke head south to meet local singles in young and vibrant Charlotte, North Carolina. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: In Joshua Tree, Gabi shared astrology insights, Alchemy provided sound healing, and Marilia discovered spiritual connection. Guide Andrew introduced mindfulness, Doug showcased grounding through sprouting, concluding with reflection in hot springs.,

programme.title: Journey Within
programme.desc: In LA, we hike with wolfs, Ayurveda insights with Jay and a delicious meal from Karla. Marilia takes an adventurous leap from an airplane, showing the freedom in extreme sports.Tracy showcases the joy of pursuing passions with WCMX at the skate park.,

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: Max & Benj Cave travel to Copenhagen to meet up with a local free runner and undertake an epic run of Tivoli Gardens.,

programme.title: Running the World

programme.title: Running the World

programme.title: My Van Life
programme.desc: Meet Lisa, a former lawyer who escaped the rat race and moved into a campervan after the early death of her mother. Lisa embarks on a cross-country road trip, peeking inside homes on wheels, and connecting with the incredible community of nomads.,

programme.title: My Van Life
programme.desc: A hurricane in the south forces Lisa to change direction. We meet southern Van Lifers living under the radar in a state where the lifestyle is judged harshly. Tragically, Lisa's story takes a heavy turn when she discovers that her father has died.,

programme.title: My Van Life
programme.desc: A colourful graffiti artist in Austin shares her story of loss with Lisa and gives her a tarot reading. We travel to rural Texas to overnight with Jupiter: an outspoken, non-binary person of colour, living in their vintage RV while studying law.,

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina travels to Mana Pools to experience the wilderness in the dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Richard guides Kristina into her closest encounter yet with a wild bull elephant.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina journeys to Camp Amalinda. Her guide, Dardley, shares some of the history of this World Heritage Site and intriguing rock paintings. They track white rhino on foot and she learns about the distinctive rock formations.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.sub-title: Ivory Safari Lodge and Khulu Lodge
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness a cheetah hunt. Do the cheetah succeed in what they were after?

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.desc: Join Lauren on a culinary adventure with various nuts as she discovers their potential beyond snacking and incorporates them into Italian and Balinese recipes like Cashew cheese, mouthwatering Cabonara and more delightful flavors.,
